# Speech Evaluation Web App - Development Instructions

This is a web application for evaluating speech pronunciation, fluency, and other metrics.

## Project Setup Checklist

- [ ] Initialize Node.js project for React frontend
- [ ] Install React and frontend dependencies
- [ ] Initialize Python virtual environment for Flask backend
- [ ] Install Python dependencies for backend
- [ ] Set up Flask API routes for audio processing
- [ ] Create React components for audio upload and results display
- [ ] Integrate audio processing pipeline
- [ ] Test end-to-end functionality

## Technology Stack

- **Frontend**: React 18+ with TypeScript
- **Backend**: Python Flask
- **Audio Processing**: librosa, soundfile, pyannote-audio
- **Speech Recognition**: OpenAI Whisper
- **ML Models**: speechocean762 dataset-based evaluation

## Next Steps

1. Create `frontend` directory with React app
2. Create `backend` directory with Flask API
3. Set up audio processing modules
4. Build React components for file upload
5. Configure API communication
